title: Prefer 'when' over single 'if' in pattern match
description: When using pattern matching, a 'when' clause should be used instead of a single 'if' statement inside the pattern match body. This improves code clarity and maintainability by making the intent explicit and reducing unnecessary nesting.
recommendation: Refactor pattern match bodies to use 'when' clauses instead of single 'if' statements for additional conditions.

checks.message: Refactor pattern match bodies to use 'when' clauses instead of single 'if' statements for additional conditions.
